title: Describing yourself
explanation:
Describing yourself

Useful patterns for A1 writing:

  • My name is… / I'm…
  • I'm [age] years old.
  • I'm from…
  • I live in…
  • I like… / I don't like…

questions.text: [*My name is Maria.|My name Maria.|Name my is Maria.]
[*I'm twenty years old.|I have twenty years.|I'm twenty years.]
[*I'm from Brazil.|I'm from in Brazil.|I from Brazil.]
[*I live in a flat.|I live on a flat.|I live at flat.]

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct phrase for each gap.

questions.text: My favourite colour is ____. | *blue | colour blue | the blue colour
[*I am a student.|I am student.|I a student.]
[*I speak a little English.|I speak little English little.|Speak I English.]
[*I have got brown eyes.|I have brown eyes got.|Got I brown eyes.]
questions.feedback: I have got / I have brown eyes.

questions.text: [*Nice to meet you.|Nice meet you.|To nice you meet.]
